creator: portmaster@bsdforge.com
text:
Attempts to upgrade, or install x11/kdelibs4 will fail.
Following /appears/ to be the problem. However, there were many other errors
emitted during the build process.

[ 47%] Generating resourcewatchermanagerinterface.cpp, resourcewatchermanagerint
erface.h
[ 47%] Generating nie.h, nie.cpp
Could not find parser plugin for encoding trig
*** Error code 1
1 error
*** Error code 2

it went on further (49%), then died.

Fix: 

unknown
How-To-Repeat: Attempt to build, or upgrade x11/kdelibs4.
